message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam databaseStyle cylinder

actor "Upper layer" as UpperLayer
actor "Lower layer" as LowerLayer

participant "tuple" as Tuple <<database>>
participant "IPv4 layer" as IPv4Layer
participant "Routing table" as RoutingTable <<database>>
participant "IPv4 interface" as IPv4Interface
participant "ARP" as ARP <<database>>

note over Tuple, UpperLayer
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

UpperLayer -> IPv4Layer: IPdata

note right of IPv4Layer
Allocate
IPv4
header
end note

IPv4Layer -> RoutingTable: dst=192.0.2.1
RoutingTable --> IPv4Layer

note left of Tuple
IPv4.oif=ifp1
IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

IPv4Layer -> IPv4Interface

IPv4Interface -> ARP: gw=198.51.100.1

note right of ARP
enqueue
packet
end note

ARP --> IPv4Interface: ARP request
IPv4Interface -> LowerLayer
LowerLayer --> IPv4Interface: ARP response
IPv4Interface -> ARP

ARP --> IPv4Interface: resolved\npackets

note right of IPv4Interface
send as
send
thread
end note

IPv4Interface -> IPv4Interface
IPv4Interface -> LowerLayer

@enduml
